sections.paragraph: ἑλϰύω/ἕλϰω [the history of morphological interplay of these forms is complex] ‘cause to move toward’, draw of pulling motion J 18:10 (sword from a sheath); haul 21:6, 11 (net); drag Ac 16:19 (Paul and Silas); 21:30 (ἕλϰω); Js 2:6 (ἕλϰω). In imagery attract (= Lat. attraho, ‘draw toward’) J 6:44; 12:32.
